news.t: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'

holdings.infoBox: UDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 292 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.04%, Apple at 6.50%, Microsoft at 4.09%, Amazon.com at 3.34%, and Alphabet at 3.19%.

overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Core Dividend Tilt Index ETF (UDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is passively managed to invest in large- and mid-cap US stocks screened for high dividend yields. UDIV was launched on Jun 1, 2016 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: Morningstar US Dividend Enhanced Select Index

data.title: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'
data.text: This week's ETF Wrap takes you inside the rally in dividend-paying equity ETFs as investors seek to position for President-elect Donald Trump's second term in the White House.
